name: dotlight-marketplace
description: Marketplace for DotLightSkillset — a lightweight curated Claude Code skillset for .NET developers

plugins.name: dotlight-skillset
plugins.description: A lightweight curated Claude Code skillset for .NET developers — 0.6.0 syncs all upstreams (superpowers v6.1.1, dotnet-skills v1.4.1), repairs three truncated core skills, adds lazy-senior-dev (anti-overengineering, adapted from ponytail), database-design-conventions (ActiveFrom/ActiveTo temporal versioning, one-schema-one-dialect) + database-review quality gate, persistence-first planning, and a description-budget token diet.
